benchmarks.name: Adroit
benchmarks.description: In-hand manipulation benchmarks featuring the Adroit hand and diverse object tasks.

benchmarks.name: DexArt
benchmarks.description: DexArt benchmarks emphasize articulated object manipulation and tool use.

benchmarks.name: Bi-DexHands
benchmarks.description: Bimanual dexterous manipulation tasks from Bi-DexHands.

benchmarks.name: DexGraspNet
benchmarks.description: A large-scale dexterous grasping benchmark for evaluating stable and diverse grasps on general objects.

benchmarks.name: DexGrasp Anything
benchmarks.description: A physics-aware benchmark for universal dexterous grasp generation across diverse objects.

benchmarks.name: Dexonomy
benchmarks.description: A grasp-taxonomy benchmark evaluating the quality and coverage of diverse dexterous grasp types.

updates.text: 🚀 Major update: New Leaderboards: DexGrasp Anything and Dexonomy leaderboards added, with available results for existing models included. New models: Add ACT, KODex, KOROL, K-UBM, KAN-We-Flow, and X-DP3 to Adroit and DexArt; Add MP1 and AdaFlow to Adroit; Add the Dexonomy model to Dexonomy; Add KPGrasp to DexGrasp Anything and Dexonomy. Results on the existing leaderboards for previously tracked models are unchanged.
Added the DexGraspNet leaderboard and updated the associated model results. You can now search Dex manipulation models by name.
Launched the Dexterous Manipulation SOTA Leaderboard.
